title: Spiced Naan Bread with Fermented Chutney
description: A flavorful and crunchy Indian flatbread served with a zesty fermented chutney, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: Brush the naan bread with butter on both sides.
Mix cumin seeds, coriander powder, ginger paste, and garlic paste in a small bowl.
Brush the spice mixture on the naan bread.
Bake the naan bread in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, warm the fermented chutney in a saucepan over low heat.
Serve the crispy naan bread with the fermented chutney for dipping.
Optional: Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions for added flavor and visual appeal.
